text: Thai Cargo Ship Hit in Strait of Hormuz; Three Crew Missing - Bloomberg.com
fullText: A Thai-flagged cargo vessel was struck in the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday shortly after departing from the United Arab Emirates, as regional tensions continue to disrupt one of the world’s most critical shipping lanes. Three people are missing.
